channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Business & Economic Policy
channel.description: Strictly Zimbabwe business, finance, mining, investment and economic-policy stories — curated from foreign press and policy press. Each item ships with a branded headline card for social autolists.

item.title: Zimbabwe adds freight rail option to lithium export gateway @Reuters
item.description: Zimbabwe adds freight rail option to lithium export gateway #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Zimbabwe: Who is Pedzai ‘Scott’ Sakupwanya, gold baron linked to Mnangagwa?

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Kariba floating solar project nears financial close as Africa expands utility-scale renewable energy investment
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Kariba floating solar project nears financial close as Africa expands utility-scale renewable energy investment — via Africa Sustainability Matters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Africa Sustainability Matters

item.title: US$1,5m lithium rail siding boosts exports @zimsituation
item.description: Source: US$1,5m lithium rail siding boosts exports – herald Sukulwenkosi Dube-Matutu THE Second Republic has taken another major step in modernising Zimbabwe’s transport infrastructure with the commissioning of a US$1,5 million lithium transshipment rail siding in West Nicholson, #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Tax relief, low charges boost ZiG use... more individuals, companies turn to local currency @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Tax relief, low charges boost ZiG use... more individuals, companies turn to local currency – herald Debra Matabvu-Senior Reporter A COMBINATION of tax relief measures and reduced bank charges has led to increased use of the Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) by individuals and corporat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe’s top critical mineral could be in focus as the US commits $300 million to detach from China
item.description: Zimbabwe’s top critical mineral could be in focus as the US commits $300 million to detach from China — via Business Insider Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Business Insider Africa

item.title: Is Zimbabwe’s Economy Finally Turning A Corner? Experts Weigh In
item.description: Is Zimbabwe’s Economy Finally Turning A Corner? Experts Weigh In — via Forbes Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe exploring minerals-backed deals with China to fund infrastructure, minister says @Reuters
item.description: Zimbabwe exploring minerals-backed deals with China to fund infrastructure, minister says — via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Zimbabwe Scrutinizes Chinese Lithium Mining
